ksa_text: Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representing the assigned domain's interests and escalating unresolved issues through established channels.

dcwf.top_element_label: Assess policy needs and collaborate with stakeholders to develop policies to govern cyber activities.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

onet.top_element_label: Resolving Conflicts and Negotiating with Others

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Governance at composite 0.430 is market-validated for Data Quality Manager. Final decision: include.
